as7265x_init.tooltip: Initialize the SparkFun AS7265X triad spectroscopy sensor

as7265x_is_connected.tooltip: Returns true if AS7265X is connected

as7265x_take_measurements.tooltip: Take spectral measurements with optional bulb

as7265x_data_available.tooltip: Check if AS7265X data is ready

as7265x_read_calibrated.tooltip: Read calibrated spectral value of specified channel

as7265x_read_raw.tooltip: Read raw spectral value of specified channel

as7265x_read_temperature.tooltip: Read the chip temperature of specified AS7265X device

as7265x_bulb.tooltip: Turn on/off the illumination bulb of specified AS7265X device

as7265x_set_bulb_current.message0: Set AS7265X %1 bulb current of device %2 %3 mA
as7265x_set_bulb_current.tooltip: Set AS7265X illumination LED current limit
